nodes.name: Ballistic Sentinel
nodes.description: Live ballistic calculator for long-range shooting built on ESP32.

nodes.name: py_ballisticcalc
nodes.description: Python ballistic trajectory calculator library used as a reference for the C++ engine.

nodes.name: ESP32-WROOM-32
nodes.description: Microcontroller platform with hardware FPU for single-precision math.

nodes.name: Pure C++ Ballistic Engine
nodes.description: Header-only C++ library with adaptive RK45 integration and PCHIP interpolation.

nodes.name: RK45 Dormand-Prince
nodes.description: Adaptive step-size integrator with embedded error estimation.

nodes.name: CIPM-2007 Atmosphere Model
nodes.description: Standard air density model used for ballistic calculations.

nodes.name: PCHIP Fritsch-Carlson Spline
nodes.description: Monotonicity-preserving cubic spline interpolation for drag tables.

nodes.name: Magnetometer Calibration
nodes.description: Hard iron offset and soft iron scale correction for QMC5883P sensor.

nodes.name: Multi-BC Support
nodes.description: Ability to handle velocity-stepped ballistic coefficients.

nodes.name: Powder Sensitivity
nodes.description: Adjustment of muzzle velocity based on powder temperature.

nodes.name: Float Inner Loop
nodes.description: Uses single-precision float for vector math to leverage ESP32 hardware FPU.

nodes.name: BME280
nodes.description: Environment sensor for temperature, pressure, and humidity.

nodes.name: MPU6050
nodes.description: Accelerometer/gyroscope for cant and roll detection.

nodes.name: Dark-Themed Web UI
nodes.description: Captive portal based configuration interface for rifle and stage settings.
